steps.title: Find the greatest common factor (GCF) of 30 and 42
Match to the choices
steps.content:
• A: $30(24x+1)$ — expands to $720x + 30 eq 30x + 42$. Eliminated.
  • B: $42(30x+1)$ — expands to $1260x + 42 eq 30x + 42$. Eliminated.
  • C: $6(24x+36)$ — expands to $144x + 216 eq 30x + 42$. Eliminated.
  • D: $6(5x+7)$ — expands to $30x + 42$. That matches choice D — D is correct.
